shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Light Rain
name: Today
detailedForecast: A chance of rain between noon and 3pm, then a chance of rain and isolated thunderstorms between 3pm and 5pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 71, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. Northeast wind 2 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
